expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers (1) dashboard-level export path: "Dashboard export → Google Sheets" with steps like "Open a dashboard" → "Open the dashboard-level export menu" → "Choose Google Sheets"; (2) option combinations: section "Dashboard export → Google Sheets — Options & combinations" including default options, toggles, valid minimal/maximal combinations, and invalid combination validation; (3) visible completion outcomes: sections for "Export completion produces a visible success outcome" and "Export failure produces a visible failure outcome" plus "in progress/started" indication.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Output is titled "Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (Subcategory-only)" and is written as a scenario draft checklist. execution_notes.md states: "Produced a Phase 4a subcategory-only scenario draft" and "Avoided forbidden Phase 4a canonical top-layer categories." The structure remains subcategory-only and focuses on scenario drafting rather than later-phase artifacts.
